hero.badge: AI copilot for high-expectation product teams
hero.title: Design, build, and ship without losing momentum
hero.subtitle: CodePilot AI connects product specs, code, testing, and delivery. Your team stays in control while AI accelerates execution.

proofOne.title: No vanity metrics
proofOne.description: You see real delivery metrics from your project, not invented growth numbers.

proofTwo.title: Human validation at each step
proofTwo.description: Every AI output is reviewed before merge so quality standards remain yours.

proofThree.title: Ready for real-world evaluation
proofThree.description: Connect your repo and measure impact directly on your current delivery workflow.

features.title: Three blocks from idea to production
features.subtitle: Each block is designed to cut noise, speed up decisions, and keep senior-level execution quality.

agents.title: Multi-agent orchestration
agents.description: AI PM, dev, and QA agents collaborate in one loop to produce clear tickets and actionable implementation plans.

context.title: Persistent codebase context
context.description: AI keeps your standards, architecture anchors, and sensitive areas in memory to generate coherent code changes.

deploy.title: Controlled release pipeline
deploy.description: Tests, security checks, and release state are centralized to reduce regressions in production.

pricing.title: Choose the plan that fits your pace
pricing.subtitle: Secure payments with Stripe. Start lean, then scale as usage and delivery volume grow.

starter.label: Starter
starter.name: Build
starter.description: Perfect for founders and freelancers who want to ship quickly.

pro.label: Most Popular
pro.name: Scale
pro.description: Great fit for product teams shipping every week.

enterprise.label: Enterprise
enterprise.name: Orbit
enterprise.description: For organizations with strict security and governance needs.
